description: A legacy backend service is running on the host machine on port 4567. A new containerized frontend application needs to connect to it, but it has the backend hostname hardcoded as 'backend.legacy.internal' and the source code cannot be modified. Configure the 'docker-compose.yml' file in '/home/ga/Documents/docker-projects/migration-task/' so that the frontend container can resolve 'backend.legacy.internal' to the host machine's IP address. Ensure the application is started and the frontend is accessible at http://localhost:8080, successfully retrieving the legacy backend's data.
